capabilities.name: WorkflowRegistryOpsPort
capabilities.description: Minimal read-only ops required from a workflow registry.

methods.name: get
methods.doc: Get a workflow definition by name; result has a `.handler` attribute.

capabilities.name: ActivityRegistryOpsPort
capabilities.description: Minimal read-only ops required from an activity registry.

methods.name: get
methods.doc: Get an activity definition by name; result has a `.handler` attribute.

capabilities.name: HandlerRegistryPort
capabilities.description: DI protocol for workflow + activity registry access.

capabilities.name: WorkflowRuntimeStorePort
capabilities.description: Minimal workflow runtime store contract required by WorkflowEngine.

capabilities.name: TaskRuntimeState
capabilities.description: Per-task runtime state tracked by the WorkflowEngine.

capabilities.name: WorkflowRuntimeState
capabilities.description: Per-workflow runtime state tracked by the WorkflowEngine.

capabilities.name: WorkflowEngine
capabilities.description: Self-hosted workflow runtime with DAG and sequential handler execution support.

methods.name: set_handler_registry
methods.doc: Set the handler registry after construction (allows DI frameworks to wire it).

methods.name: _now
methods.doc: Return current UTC timestamp as ISO string.

methods.name: _bootstrap_handlers
methods.doc: Register all handlers from the injected HandlerRegistry.

methods.name: _retry_delay
methods.doc: Calculate retry delay with exponential backoff and jitter (delegated to shared utility).

methods.name: _norm
methods.doc: Normalize a handler result to a dict with string keys (delegated to shared utility).
